message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

participant "App" as App
participant "OperateStructure" as OperateStructure
participant "OperateNodeA" as OperateNodeA
participant "OperateNodeB" as OperateNodeB
participant "VisitorA" as VisitorA

App -> OperateStructure : new新建
activate OperateStructure
OperateStructure -> OperateNodeA : 调用OperateNode中的accept(Visitor)方法
activate OperateNodeA
OperateStructure -> OperateNodeB : 调用OperateNode中的accept(Visitor)方法
activate OperateNodeB
OperateNodeA -> VisitorA : 调用Visitor中的visit(OperateNodeA)方法
activate VisitorA
VisitorA --> OperateNodeA : 调用OperateNode中的attendance()方法,返回结果
deactivate VisitorA
OperateNodeB -> VisitorA : 调用Visitor中的visit(OperateNodeB)方法
activate VisitorA
deactivate VisitorA
deactivate OperateNodeB
deactivate OperateNodeA
OperateNodeA --> OperateStructure
OperateStructure --> App
deactivate OperateStructure

@enduml
```
